name: Marianna, Your Wife With Amnesia
description:
What do you do when your wife loses her memory and another man tries to pass himself off as her husband instead of you? LOL, it's complete nonsense, right? You have a phone full of photos. Things in your house that you bought together. You have a home that clearly has two people living in it. You can call your friends, parents (yours or hers) who can easily confirm you're husband and wife. Finally, you have documents proving your marriage. There are government agencies with all your information. There are medical institutions and God knows what else. Proving that YOU are the husband, and not someone else, is one of the easiest tasks in the world.

BUT what if you live in the Middle Ages? There is no technology, no photos, no government agencies, and no proper documents. You can't quickly contact relatives. And in this world, there is NO MAGIC.

P.S. I tried to make Marianne not a fool who believes the first person she meets, but a doubting, intelligent woman. However, because of this, it might still be easy to prove that you're her husband.

FAQ & Author's Ramblings:

My first bot got almost 300 chats, which was a surprise for me. And some people actually liked it! So I decided to make another one.

  • I'll be releasing bots with varying frequency, so if you're interested, you can follow me. I'll add some description and authors I like to my profile.

  • I will NOT create bots with: weird fetishes (vore, scat, etc.). Your "loving and loyal" girlfriend/wife who is a porn star, an OnlyFans model, cheats on you for fun, etc.

  • I welcome any and all criticism, feedback, and suggestions. Or you can just write that it's shit.

  • All my bots have been tested with a male persona on Deepseek V0324.

  • I am not a native English speaker.
creator: RanceX
